GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [w_state@0 ASC NULLS LAST, i_item_id@1 ASC NULLS LAST]
  GpuSortExec
    GpuProjectExec
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[w_state, i_item_id], aggr=[sum(CASE WHEN date_dim.d_date < Utf8("2000-03-11") THEN catalog_sales.cs_sales_price - coalesce(catalog_returns.cr_refunded_cash,Int64(0)) ELSE Int64(0) END), sum(CASE WHEN date_dim.d_date >= Utf8("2000-03-11") THEN catalog_sales.cs_sales_price - coalesce(catalog_returns.cr_refunded_cash,Int64(0)) ELSE Int64(0) END)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=10324440
          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([w_state@0, i_item_id@1], 8), input_partitions=8

              GpuProjectExec
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=10324440
                  GpuHashJoinExec

--- memory ---
